auth_note: All endpoints require JWT auth. Tests use a mock JWT with userId, companyId, tenantId claims. Permission guards enforce resource-level RBAC.

endpoints.description: Create a new AI chat session (E5.2)

test_cases.name: Create session - happy path with default channel

db_verification.query: SELECT id, status, channel, user_id, company_id FROM ai_conversations WHERE id = '{{response.data.id}}'
db_verification.expected: Row exists with status='active', channel='web_chat', user_id matches JWT userId, company_id matches JWT companyId

test_cases.name: Create session - happy path with explicit channel and agentId

db_verification.query: SELECT channel, agent_id FROM ai_conversations WHERE id = '{{response.data.id}}'

test_cases.name: Create session - missing auth returns 401
Create session - invalid channel value returns 400
Create session - invalid agentId format returns 400
Create session - AI service degraded returns 503
test_cases.precondition: AI plugin failed to initialize (aiOrchestrator=null, chatSessionService=null)

endpoints.description: HTTP fallback for non-streaming AI chat (E5.1)

test_cases.name: Chat message - happy path returns AI text response

db_verification.query: SELECT role, content FROM ai_messages WHERE conversation_id = '{{sessionId}}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 2
db_verification.expected: Two rows: user message with content='What invoices are overdue?' and assistant message with AI response

test_cases.name: Chat message - happy path with page context
Chat message - missing auth returns 401
Chat message - missing sessionId returns 400
Chat message - empty content returns 400
Chat message - content exceeds 10000 chars returns 400
Chat message - AI service degraded returns 503
Chat message - AI quota exceeded returns 429
test_cases.precondition: AI Gateway returns quota exceeded error

test_cases.name: Chat message - AI returns action_proposal type
test_cases.precondition: AI structured output contains action intent

body.content: Create an invoice for Acme Corp

test_cases.name: Chat message - multi-turn context preserved
test_cases.precondition: Session has existing messages in conversation history

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ai_messages WHERE conversation_id = '{{session_with_history}}'
db_verification.expected: Count increases by 2 (user message + assistant response)

WS - connect without JWT rejected with AUTH_REQUIRED
WS - connect with expired JWT rejected

db_verification.expected: User message and assistant response persisted

db_verification.expected: New conversation created with auto-generated title

test_cases.name: WS - send message with another user's sessionId returns SESSION_NOT_FOUND

cross_cutting_concerns_tested.companyId_scoping: All list/get endpoints verify companyId isolation
cross_cutting_concerns_tested.auth_jwt: Every endpoint tested with missing/expired JWT
cross_cutting_concerns_tested.permission_rbac: Key endpoints tested with insufficient permissions
cross_cutting_concerns_tested.graceful_degradation: All endpoint groups tested with service=null (503 response)
cross_cutting_concerns_tested.multi_tenant_isolation: Session listing/access tested across users and companies
cross_cutting_concerns_tested.ai_guardrails_nfr16: Financial actions always require approval regardless of confidence

known_issues_from_code_review: E5.2-CR#2: POST /chat/sessions/:sessionId/end returns 200 even when session not found (should be 404)
E5.2-CR#1: endSession TOCTOU race in ownership check
E5.4-CR#1: PredictionService silently swallows AI errors, returns empty results instead of 429/503
E5.3-CR#5: In-memory action proposal storage breaks in multi-instance deployments
E5.5-CR#1: resolveRole() uses string pattern matching instead of access-group-based resolution
